footer.description: Senior Software Engineer and consultant for web development, digital support, AI automations and practical IT services.
footer.emailAria: Send an email to Federico Croletti

hero.eyebrow: Senior Software Engineer · Web development · Digital support
hero.title: Hi, I am Federico Croletti. I create simple, modern and reliable digital solutions.
hero.subtitle: I am a Senior Software Engineer specialized in Angular, and I also help professionals, small businesses and private clients with websites, WordPress, digital identity tools, certified email, digital signatures, backups, email management, PC formatting and practical AI usage.
hero.panelText: I combine enterprise experience with practical support: I can work on complex Angular architectures, publish simple websites and help with everyday digital problems, including AI usage backed by AWS Certified AI Practitioner knowledge.

servicesPreview.title: Practical services for companies, professionals and private clients
servicesPreview.body: From Angular and WordPress websites to PC support, formatting, backups, email, digital identity, certified email, digital signatures and AI tools: the goal is to make technology simpler and more useful.

skills.title: Development, digital support and practical AI

webPractical.title: Websites and WordPress
webPractical.body: Personal sites, showcase websites, landing pages, restyling, contact forms and support publishing online.

digitalSupport.title: Digital support
digitalSupport.body: Digital identity, certified email, digital signatures, email management, data backup, PC formatting, configurations and everyday issues.

frontend.title: Modern front-end
frontend.body: Angular, TypeScript, HTML, SCSS, Angular Material, RxJS, NgRx.

architecture.title: Enterprise architecture
architecture.body: Micro Frontend, Module Federation, shared libraries, federated routing, design systems.

leadership.title: Technical leadership
leadership.body: Team leading, mentoring, code review, clear priorities and stakeholder communication.

aiCloud.title: AI and cloud mindset
aiCloud.body: Practical AI usage, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, lightweight automations and AWS Certified AI Practitioner certification.

experience.title: Enterprise experience and concrete digital support
experience.body: I have worked on financial, insurance, geospatial and document-management applications, and I bring the same method to websites, digital services, operational support, AI automations and everyday technical problems.

points.websitesWordpress: Personal sites, showcase websites, WordPress and online publishing
points.digitalServices: Support for digital identity, certified email, digital signatures and online procedures
points.backupEmailFormatting: Data backups, email management, PC formatting and setup
points.aiCertification: Applied AI with AWS Certified AI Practitioner certification
points.maps: Interactive maps based on Leaflet and WMS
points.auth: Integration with authentication systems such as Keycloak

help.title: Clear technology even when the problem is not technical on paper
help.body: An account that does not work, an email box to configure, a PC to fix or a website to publish can block entire days. I help you understand the problem, choose a sensible path and solve it with order.
help.panel: My approach is practical: I listen, translate the problem into clear steps and propose a sustainable solution without complicating what should remain simple.

intro.first: I am Federico Croletti, a Senior Software Engineer experienced in designing and developing enterprise applications. I work on Angular, modern architectures, micro frontends, i18n, interactive maps and code quality, but also on concrete digital services for people and small businesses.
intro.second: I have worked across financial, insurance, geospatial and document-management contexts. Beyond development, I support Team Leadership and People Management and bring the same method to websites, WordPress, digital identity, certified email, digital signatures, backups, email management, PC formatting and AI tools.
intro.personal: I like keeping technical skill and human connection on the same level: behind every project there are people, concrete goals and decisions that should become simpler. This photo gives a face to the story I share here, for clients, colleagues and followers who want to know me better.

photo.alt: Federico Croletti in the mountains with an alpine landscape in the background
photo.caption: A face behind the code: I work with technical precision, but I always start by listening to people.

cv.title: Download my CV
cv.body: Want to learn more about my professional path, experience and technical skills? You can download my updated CV as a PDF.
cv.privacyNote: On the public site I avoid showing full address, birth date and other sensitive personal details.

services.intro: I help private clients, professionals, small businesses and companies with websites, IT support, digital tools, AI automations and technical consulting. Each service is explained clearly, so you immediately know what to expect.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Want to discuss a project, collaboration, job opportunity or technical consulting? Write to me: I will reply as soon as possible.

info.title: Public channels
info.servicesBody: Need a website, digital support or help with AI tools? You can describe the problem through the form.

form.title: Send a request
form.subject: Subject
form.privacyCopy: The data entered will only be used to reply to your request. It will not be used for newsletters or unsolicited commercial communication.
form.success: Message sent successfully. I will reply as soon as possible.
form.error: The message could not be sent through the external form service. Please try again later or write to me directly by email.
form.endpointMissing: The form service endpoint is not configured. Insert the real value in environment.contactEndpoint.
form.networkError: The form service is not reachable from this network or was blocked by the browser/proxy. The message was not sent.
form.backendEmailMissing: The backend is reachable, but email delivery is not configured on the server yet. The message was not sent.
form.providerRejected: The form service did not explicitly confirm message delivery. For safety, the message is not considered sent.

requestTypes.digitalIdentity: Certified email / digital identity / digital signature

errors.messageMin: The message must contain at least 20 characters.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This notice explains in plain language how personal data collected through the site and contact form is processed. The text is prepared according to privacy best practices and should be validated before final publication.

owner.title: Owner
owner.body: The data controller is Federico Croletti. For privacy-related requests you can write to federico.croletti@gmail.com. No professional address, certified email or VAT number is published because these details have not been indicated as public data.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: The site is used for professional presentation, portfolio, promotion of IT services and management of contacts received from users, companies, professionals or private clients interested in collaborations, consulting or support requests.

data.title: Processed data
data.body: The contact form may process full name, email, subject, request type, message, confirmation of the privacy notice and minimal technical data transmitted by the external sending service. You should not submit sensitive data or unnecessary information.

mandatory.title: Mandatory and optional data
mandatory.body: The data requested by the form is necessary to understand and reply to the request. If it is not provided, the message may not be sent or managed. Any additional data voluntarily entered in the message is provided under the user's responsibility.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: The legal basis is the user's request and the performance of pre-contractual or contractual measures. Where appropriate, legitimate interest in managing communications voluntarily received may also apply. Consent is requested where necessary, for example for non-technical analytics tools.

processing.title: Processing methods
processing.body: Processing is carried out through IT tools, email, website hosting and the external form sending service. SMTP credentials, secret keys or private tokens are not used in the frontend code.

formProvider.title: External form service
formProvider.body: The contact form uses FormSubmit, an external service compatible with static sites, to forward requests to the owner's email address without building a custom backend. FormSubmit may process the minimal technical data required to send the message; more information is available at https://formsubmit.co/privacy.pdf. On the first submission the service may require email confirmation of the recipient address.

hosting.title: Hosting and publication
hosting.body: The site is published as a static site on Render.com. Render.com may process technical data required to provide the service, such as technical logs, IP addresses and request data according to its own terms and notices.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Received messages are kept only for the time needed to reply and manage the request. Expected operational period: maximum 12 months, unless further needs arise from obligations, rights protection or continuation of the professional relationship.

recipients.title: Recipients and technical providers
recipients.body: Data may be accessed by Federico Croletti and by technical providers strictly necessary for the site and form operation, including Render.com for hosting, FormSubmit for message forwarding, Google Fonts for typography resources and Plausible only if the user accepts analytics.

transfers.title: Transfers outside the EU
transfers.body: Some technical providers may process data outside the European Economic Area. The specific safeguards and transfer bases should be verified in each provider's notices before final publication.

newsletter.title: Newsletter and marketing
newsletter.body: The site does not use data for newsletters or unsolicited commercial communication.

cookiesAnalytics.title: Cookies and analytics
cookiesAnalytics.body: The site stores cookie preferences locally as necessary technical data. Plausible analytics is disabled by default and is loaded only if the user gives consent. No marketing cookies or tools are configured.

thirdParties.title: Third-party services
thirdParties.body: External links to LinkedIn and GitHub, Google Fonts loading and FormSubmit for the contact form are present. Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Microsoft Clarity, Meta Pixel, LinkedIn Insight Tag, embedded maps, YouTube videos, reCAPTCHA or embedded social widgets were not detected.

security.title: Security
security.body: Technical measures proportionate to a static website are adopted to reduce unauthorized access, loss or misuse of data. The frontend does not contain secret keys, private tokens or service credentials.

rights.title: Data subject rights
rights.body: You may request access, rectification, deletion, restriction, objection to processing and data portability where provided by the GDPR. You may also lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

contact.title: Privacy contact
contact.body: For privacy-related requests you can write to federico.croletti@gmail.com.

updates.title: Updates
updates.body: This notice may be updated if the site, external services or processing methods change. Last update: 15/07/2026.

legalReview.title: Validation note
legalReview.body: This notice is prepared according to privacy best practices for a static personal website, but it is not legal advice. Before final publication it should be reviewed with a professional.

banner.title: Cookie preferences
banner.body: We use technical cookies required for the site to work. With your consent we may also use Plausible for aggregated privacy-friendly statistics. You can accept, reject or manage your preferences.

preferences.title: Manage cookie preferences
preferences.intro: You can choose which non-essential categories to enable. Necessary cookies remain active because they are required for the basic operation of the site.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.body: Required for the basic operation of the site and to remember cookie preferences in the browser through localStorage. They do not require prior consent.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: If accepted, Plausible is loaded for aggregated statistics about site usage. This category is disabled by default and is not loaded before consent.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.body: Marketing, profiling or advertising tools are not configured. This category remains disabled.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This page explains which storage technologies or third-party services may be used by the site and how to manage consent.

what.title: What cookies are
what.body: Cookies and similar technologies are small technical tools that allow a site to work, remember preferences or collect statistical information. Some preferences may also be saved in localStorage, which remains in the user's browser.

technical.title: Technical and necessary cookies
technical.body: The site uses only technical data required for basic operation, including cookie preferences saved in localStorage. These tools are not used to profile users and do not require prior consent.

preferences.title: Consent preferences
preferences.body: The user's choice is saved in the browser to avoid showing the banner on every visit. The choice can always be changed from the Manage cookie preferences link in the footer.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: The site may use Plausible Analytics only after user consent. Plausible is configured as a privacy-friendly analytics tool and is loaded dynamically only if the Analytics category is accepted.

marketing.title: Marketing and profiling
marketing.body: Marketing cookies, advertising pixels or profiling tools are not present. The Marketing category remains disabled and cannot be selected.

thirdParties.title: Third-party services
thirdParties.body: Detected services: Render.com for hosting, FormSubmit for form sending, Google Fonts/Material Icons for fonts and icons, Plausible only after analytics consent, external links to LinkedIn and GitHub. Embedded maps, YouTube videos, reCAPTCHA or embedded social widgets are not present.

manage.title: How to change consent
manage.body: You can change or revoke consent at any time from the Manage cookie preferences button in the site footer. Rejecting non-essential cookies does not prevent navigation.

browser.title: Browser settings
browser.body: You can also delete cookies and local data from your browser settings. Deleting local preferences will make the banner appear again on the next visit.

updates.title: Updates
updates.body: This cookie policy may be updated if new technical tools, analytics or third-party services are added. Last update: 15/07/2026.

legalReview.title: Validation note
legalReview.body: This cookie policy is prepared according to best practices for a static personal website, but it should be reviewed with a professional for final legal compliance.
